title: Redesigning metals at the atomic level to boost future technology
summary_en: Researchers in the University of Minnesota Twin Cities have discovered a powerful new way to control the electronic behavior of a metal—by manipulating the atomic properties of materials where they meet.
title_cn: 明尼苏达大学双城分校研究人员实现原子层面金属特性调控 可为未来技术发展提供支撑
